creator: kazami@angels.vg
text:
XML_Tree is not need
see http://pear.php.net/package/XML_RSS/download/0.9.9

How-To-Repeat: % cd /usr/ports/devel/pear-XML_RSS
% make extract
===>  Extracting for pear-XML_RSS-0.9.9
=> MD5 Checksum OK for PEAR/XML_RSS-0.9.9.tgz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for PEAR/XML_RSS-0.9.9.tgz.
% pear package-dependencies work/package.xml
Dependencies for pear/XML_RSS
=============================
Required? Type    Name       Relation Version
Yes       Package XML_Parser >        1.0.1
